headlines.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to Orthodox Easter truce
headlines.summary: Vladimir Putin announced a truce between Russia and Ukraine that will last from Saturday afternoon through Easter Sunday.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
headlines.summary: The US president accused Iran of 'doing a very poor job' with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon prepare to begin peace talks.

headlines.title: Kuwait blames Iran for drone strikes as Trump casts doubt on ceasefire
headlines.summary: Kuwait has blamed Iran for drone strikes amid growing uncertainty about the US-Iran ceasefire agreement.

headlines.title: Ukraine and Russia moving towards potential peace deal, Zelenskiy aide says
headlines.summary: Bloomberg News reported that Ukraine and Russia are moving towards a potential deal to end the war, citing the top aide to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy.

headlines.title: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing
headlines.summary: Cheng Li-wun, leader of the Kuomintang party, is the first sitting leader to visit China in a decade.

headlines.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
headlines.summary: The First Lady called rumors that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump 'mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation' and delivered a statement at the White House.

headlines.title: Zelenskyy says Ukrainian forces shot down Shahed drones in Middle Eastern countries during Iran war
headlines.summary: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy revealed that Ukrainian forces shot down Iranian-made Shahed drones in Middle Eastern countries during the conflict.

headlines.title: China and North Korea pledge to enhance communication on international affairs
headlines.summary: China's foreign minister met with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un, with both sides agreeing to further enhance coordination in major international and regional affairs.

headlines.title: India 'deeply concerned' by civilian casualties in Lebanon
headlines.summary: The Indian foreign ministry expressed deep concern over reports of civilian casualties in Lebanon, two days after Israel's worst bombardment killed more than 300 people.

headlines.title: Artemis crew returning to Earth with Moon discoveries
headlines.summary: The four astronauts said they were returning to Earth with 'so many more pictures, so many more stories' following their lunar mission.

headlines.title: Hip-hop pioneer Afrika Bambaataa dies at age 68
headlines.summary: The Bronx-born rapper's global hit Planet Rock is credited with shaping hip-hop in the 1980s.

headlines.title: Ireland protesters willing to 'close the country' over fuel costs
headlines.summary: Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland has been affected for the fourth day as vehicles, including tractors, block roads in protest over rising fuel costs.
